title: Amitostigma tominagae
taxonomy: Amitostigma tominagae is a species of orchid, which falls under the family Orchidaceae. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Amitostigma tominagae belonging to the subfamily Orchidoideae. The subfamily Orchidoideae is a large and diverse group of orchids, comprising over 6,000 species. These orchids are typically terrestrial and have adapted to a variety of environments, including forests and grasslands. Within the Orchidoideae subfamily, Amitostigma tominagae is classified as a member of the tribe Orchideae.
